title: campanula andina
intro: Campanula andina is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family, Campanulaceae, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campanula andina include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Campanula andina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
